mission.title: Install and Configure ORAS on Kubernetes
mission.description: ORAS (OCI Registry As Storage) is a CLI tool and Go library for pushing and pulling OCI artifacts to and from OCI-compliant registries. It enables using container registries to store any type of artifact, extending beyond container images.

steps.title: Install the ORAS CLI
steps.description:
Download and install the ORAS CLI binary. Multiple installation methods are available.
```bash
# Using Homebrew (macOS/Linux)
brew install oras

# Or download binary directly (Linux amd64)
curl -fsSL https://github.com/oras-project/oras/releases/download/v1.3.1/oras_1.3.1_linux_amd64.tar.gz -o oras.tar.gz
tar -xzf oras.tar.gz
sudo mv oras /usr/local/bin/

# Verify installation
oras version
```

steps.title: Push an artifact to a registry
steps.description:
Use ORAS to push a file as an OCI artifact to a container registry.
```bash
# Create a sample artifact
echo "Hello ORAS" > artifact.txt

# Push to a registry (replace with your registry)
oras push localhost:5000/myartifact:v1 artifact.txt
```

steps.title: Pull an artifact from a registry
steps.description:
Use ORAS to pull an OCI artifact back from the registry.
```bash
mkdir output && cd output
oras pull localhost:5000/myartifact:v1
cat artifact.txt
```

steps.title: Use ORAS in a Kubernetes Job
steps.description:
Create a Kubernetes Job that uses ORAS to pull artifacts as part of a workflow.
```bash
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: oras-pull-job
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: oras
        image: ghcr.io/oras-project/oras:v1.3.1
        command: ["oras"]
        args: ["pull", "registry.example.com/myartifact:v1", "-o", "/output"]
        volumeMounts:
        - name: output
          mountPath: /output
      volumes:
      - name: output
        emptyDir: {}
      restartPolicy: Never
EOF
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation will have the ORAS CLI available for pushing and pulling OCI artifacts. ORAS can also be used within Kubernetes Jobs to manage artifact distribution as part of CI/CD pipelines.
codeSnippets:
curl -fsSL https://github.com/oras-project/oras/releases/download/v1.3.1/oras_1.3.1_linux_amd64.tar.gz -o oras.tar.gz
tar -xzf oras.tar.gz
sudo mv oras /usr/local/bin/

uninstall.title: Remove the ORAS binary
uninstall.description: Delete the ORAS binary from /usr/local/bin/ or uninstall via Homebrew.

uninstall.title: Clean up artifacts
uninstall.description: Delete any OCI artifacts pushed to registries if no longer needed.

upgrade.title: Download the latest ORAS release
upgrade.description: Download the latest binary from the GitHub releases page or run brew upgrade oras.

troubleshooting.title: Push fails with authentication error
troubleshooting.description:
Login to the registry before pushing.
```bash
oras login registry.example.com
```

troubleshooting.title: Pull fails with not found error
troubleshooting.description:
Verify the artifact reference (registry/repository:tag) is correct and exists in the registry.
```bash
oras discover registry.example.com/myartifact:v1
```

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have kubectl installed. An OCI-compliant container registry is needed for pushing and pulling artifacts.
